title: gentiana autumnalis subsp. autumnalis
intro: Gentiana autumnalis subsp. autumnalis, also known as autumn gentian or autumnal gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of gentiana autumnalis subsp. autumnalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, gentiana autumnalis subsp. autumnalis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in some commercial medications, such as cough syrups and expectorants.
